# Description

Implement this task.


# [PKT-RLS-008](task-0053): Ledger Integration

## Purpose

Integrate ledger with release system.

## Scope

- Ledger format
- Integration logic
- Data flow

## Implementation

1. Define ledger format
2. Implement integration
3. Ensure data flow

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Ledger format defined
2. Integrated
3. Data flows
